items.name: animated-content
items.title: Animated Content
items.description: Scroll-triggered entrance animation with distance, direction, scale and opacity controls. Powered by GSAP + ScrollTrigger.

items.name: antigravity
items.title: Antigravity
items.description: Instanced 3D particles that orbit and react to the mouse with wave physics, rendered with three.js.

items.name: blob-cursor
items.title: Blob Cursor
items.description: Gooey blob cursor with a trail of lagging blobs, smoothed via GSAP.

items.name: click-spark
items.title: Click Spark
items.description: Clickable container that emits radial spark lines on click.

items.name: crosshair
items.title: Crosshair
items.description: Animated crosshair lines that follow the cursor with subtle SVG turbulence on hover.

items.name: cubes
items.title: Cubes
items.description: 3D cube grid that tilts toward the cursor with optional ripple-on-click and idle drift.

items.name: electric-border
items.title: Electric Border
items.description: Animated electric arcs around rounded rectangle borders rendered to canvas with noise displacement.

items.name: fade-content
items.title: Fade Content
items.description: Scroll-triggered fade-in (with optional blur) entrance using GSAP + ScrollTrigger, with optional auto-disappearance.

items.name: ghost-cursor
items.title: Ghost Cursor
items.description: WebGL ghostly cursor trail rendered with three.js + bloom + film grain post-processing.

items.name: glare-hover
items.title: Glare Hover
items.description: Hover-triggered moving glare highlight across a card.

items.name: gradual-blur
items.title: Gradual Blur
items.description: Multi-layer gradient-masked backdrop blur for soft fade-out edges (top/bottom/left/right).

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: Mouse trail of images with 8 visually distinct GSAP variants.

items.name: laser-flow
items.title: Laser Flow
items.description: Volumetric laser beam with wisps and tilting fog volume, rendered with three.js raw shader.

items.name: logo-loop
items.title: Logo Loop
items.description: Smooth, infinite, pause-on-hover marquee for partner logos with optional fade-out edges.

items.name: magic-rings
items.title: Magic Rings
items.description: WebGL2 concentric ring animation with mouse parallax, hover scale, and click burst. Real three.js shader.

items.name: magnet
items.title: Magnet
items.description: Magnetic pull effect that attracts content toward the cursor when nearby.

items.name: magnet-lines
items.title: Magnet Lines
items.description: A grid of small line segments that rotate to face the cursor.

items.name: meta-balls
items.title: Meta Balls
items.description: Animated metaballs (gooey blob field) with cursor interaction, rendered with OGL shader.

items.name: metallic-paint
items.title: Metallic Paint
items.description: Image-driven liquid metallic paint shader (WebGL2) with depth field solved via SOR relaxation.

items.name: noise
items.title: Noise
items.description: Full-viewport animated film-grain canvas overlay.

items.name: orbit-images
items.title: Orbit Images
items.description: Images orbiting along a configurable SVG path (ellipse, circle, star, heart, infinity, wave, custom).

items.name: pixel-trail
items.title: Pixel Trail
items.description: Pixelated mouse trail with optional gooey blend, rendered with three.js + a canvas-based trail texture.

items.name: pixel-transition
items.title: Pixel Transition
items.description: Hover/click reveal that transitions between two contents through a randomized pixel grid effect.

items.name: ribbons
items.title: Ribbons
items.description: Colorful spring-driven ribbon trails following the cursor, rendered with OGL polylines.

items.name: shape-blur
items.title: Shape Blur
items.description: Mouse-reactive blurred SDF shapes (rounded rect, circle, ring, triangle) rendered with three.js.

items.name: splash-cursor
items.title: Splash Cursor
items.description: Liquid splash burst at cursor with curling ripples and waves.

items.name: star-border
items.title: Star Border
items.description: Button-like wrapper with two animated radial-gradient sweeps tracing the top and bottom border.

items.name: sticker-peel
items.title: Sticker Peel
items.description: Draggable sticker that peels off on hover, with SVG specular lighting and drop shadow filters.

items.name: target-cursor
items.title: Target Cursor
items.description: Custom spinning crosshair cursor that snaps to corners of elements matching a selector when hovered.

items.name: aurora
items.title: Aurora
items.description: WebGL aurora background with configurable color stops, amplitude, blend and speed. Real OGL shader, not a CSS gradient.

items.name: balatro
items.title: Balatro
items.description: Swirling pixel-painted Balatro-style WebGL background with mouse interaction.

items.name: ballpit
items.title: Ballpit
items.description: Interactive 3D ball pit using Three.js physics.

items.name: beams
items.title: Beams
items.description: Light beams animated with noise displacement.

items.name: color-bends
items.title: Color Bends
items.description: Three.js shader background with warped color bands, pointer parallax, noise, and rotation controls.

items.name: dark-veil
items.title: Dark Veil
items.description: Dark veil WebGL background with hue shift, scanlines, noise and warp controls.

items.name: dither
items.title: Dither
items.description: Bayer-dithered animated wave field.

items.name: dot-field
items.title: Dot Field
items.description: Interactive dotted canvas background with cursor bulge, glow, sparkle, and wave controls.

items.name: dot-grid
items.title: Dot Grid
items.description: Interactive grid of dots with cursor proximity highlighting and shockwave click physics.

items.name: evil-eye
items.title: Evil Eye
items.description: Reactive evil eye background with cursor-tracked pupil.

items.name: faulty-terminal
items.title: Faulty Terminal
items.description: OGL terminal-style shader background with scanlines, glitches, curvature, mouse reaction, and load animation.

items.name: floating-lines
items.title: Floating Lines
items.description: Layered animated wave lines with parallax & bend.

items.name: galaxy
items.title: Galaxy
items.description: Animated galaxy of twinkling stars.

items.name: gradient-blinds
items.title: Gradient Blinds
items.description: Animated gradient blinds with spotlight tracking.

items.name: grainient
items.title: Grainient
items.description: Animated WebGL2 grainy gradient.

items.name: grid-distortion
items.title: Grid Distortion
items.description: Image grid distortion driven by mouse movement.

items.name: grid-motion
items.title: Grid Motion
items.description: Grid that pans with mouse position, powered by GSAP.

items.name: grid-scan
items.title: Grid Scan
items.description: Animated 3D grid scan with bloom and chromatic aberration. Optional face tracking via face-api.js.

items.name: hyperspeed
items.title: Hyperspeed
items.description: Three.js hyperspeed road background with bloom, SMAA, distortion presets, animated light trails, and hold-to-accelerate interaction.

items.name: iridescence
items.title: Iridescence
items.description: Animated iridescent WebGL background with optional mouse parallax.

items.name: letter-glitch
items.title: Letter Glitch
items.description: Cascading glitchy letter grid background.

items.name: light-pillar
items.title: LightPillar
items.description: Volumetric raymarched light pillar.

items.name: light-rays
items.title: Light Rays
items.description: Animated volumetric light rays rendered with OGL.

items.name: lightning
items.title: Lightning
items.description: Procedural lightning bolt WebGL background.

items.name: line-waves
items.title: Line Waves
items.description: Warped line waves background powered by OGL.

items.name: liquid-chrome
items.title: Liquid Chrome
items.description: Liquid chrome animated WebGL background with mouse and touch interaction.

items.name: liquid-ether
items.title: Liquid Ether
items.description: Interactive liquid shader with flowing distortion and customizable colors.

items.name: orb
items.title: Orb
items.description: Dreamy hue-shifting orb with hover interaction.

items.name: particles
items.title: Particles
items.description: OGL-based 3D point cloud particles with hover interaction.

items.name: pixel-blast
items.title: PixelBlast
items.description: Pixelated dithered shape field with ripples and liquid distortion.

items.name: pixel-snow
items.title: Pixel Snow
items.description: Volumetric pixel snowfall background.

items.name: plasma
items.title: Plasma
items.description: Volumetric plasma WebGL2 background with optional mouse interaction and color tinting.

items.name: plasma-wave
items.title: Plasma Wave
items.description: Raymarched plasma wave background.

items.name: prism
items.title: Prism
items.description: Animated raymarched prism with hue and bloom.

items.name: prismatic-burst
items.title: PrismaticBurst
items.description: Volumetric ray burst with bend and color gradient.

items.name: radar
items.title: Radar
items.description: Radar sweep background rendered with OGL.

items.name: ripple-grid
items.title: Ripple Grid
items.description: Animated rippling grid background powered by OGL with mouse interaction.

items.name: shape-grid
items.title: Shape Grid
items.description: Animated grid of squares, hexagons, circles, or triangles with hover trail and configurable scroll direction.

items.name: silk
items.title: Silk
items.description: Silk-like animated WebGL background using a Three.js shader plane.

items.name: soft-aurora
items.title: Soft Aurora
items.description: Soft aurora bands rendered with OGL using Perlin noise.

items.name: threads
items.title: Threads
items.description: Animated WebGL line/threads background with mouse parallax.

items.name: waves
items.title: Waves
items.description: Perlin-noise wavy line grid that reacts to the cursor.

items.name: animated-list
items.title: Animated List
items.description: Scroll-aware list with item-by-item scale + fade transitions and keyboard navigation.

items.name: border-glow
items.title: Border Glow
items.description: Card with directional, edge-sensitive mesh-gradient border glow that follows the pointer.

items.name: bounce-cards
items.title: Bounce Cards
items.description: GSAP-powered card stack with elastic intro animation and optional hover-to-spread.

items.name: bubble-menu
items.title: Bubble Menu
items.description: Pill-style overlay nav with staggered GSAP bubble entrance animation.

items.name: card-nav
items.title: Card Nav
items.description: Expandable navbar with three reveal cards animated by GSAP.

items.name: card-swap
items.title: Card Swap
items.description: Three-card stack that auto-cycles with skewed perspective transforms (GSAP).

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Draggable carousel with spring snap, autoplay, optional loop, and 3D rotateY parallax.

items.name: chroma-grid
items.title: Chroma Grid
items.description: Card grid with cursor-following spotlight reveal of color from a desaturated overlay (GSAP).

items.name: circular-gallery
items.title: Circular Gallery
items.description: WebGL bent gallery with momentum scroll, picture-frame distortion, and titles.

items.name: counter
items.title: Counter
items.description: Animated rolling-digit counter with spring physics (motion).

items.name: decay-card
items.title: Decay Card
items.description: Image card that warps with SVG turbulence + displacement, lerped to cursor velocity (GSAP).

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: macOS-style magnification dock with spring physics. Each item scales smoothly based on cursor distance.

items.name: dome-gallery
items.title: Dome Gallery
items.description: Draggable 3D image dome with momentum, click-to-enlarge, and dome blur overlays.

items.name: elastic-slider
items.title: Elastic Slider
items.description: Slider that stretches with overshoot decay and bounce-back spring (motion).

items.name: flowing-menu
items.title: Flowing Menu
items.description: Vertical menu where rows reveal an animated marquee from the closest edge on hover (GSAP).

items.name: flying-posters
items.title: Flying Posters
items.description: 3D posters rotate on scroll infinitely.

items.name: folder
items.title: Folder
items.description: Click to open a folder, fanning out paper snippets that follow the cursor on hover.

items.name: glass-icons
items.title: Glass Icons
items.description: Floating glass-effect icon buttons with skewed gradient cards behind a frosted face.

items.name: glass-surface
items.title: Glass Surface
items.description: Liquid-glass surface using SVG displacement filters and chromatic offset.

items.name: gooey-nav
items.title: Gooey Nav
items.description: Pill-style nav with a gooey, particle-bursting active highlight powered by SVG-style filter blur+contrast.

items.name: infinite-menu
items.title: Infinite Menu
items.description: Spherical icosahedron menu rendered with WebGL2 + instanced disc atlas, dragged via arcball physics.

items.name: magic-bento
items.title: Magic Bento
items.description: Bento grid with spotlight, particle stars, border glow, tilt, and magnetism.

items.name: masonry
items.title: Masonry
items.description: Animated responsive masonry grid with GSAP entrance and hover effects.

items.name: model-viewer
items.title: Model Viewer
items.description: Interactive GLTF/GLB/FBX/OBJ model viewer with orbit, parallax, and hover effects.

items.name: pill-nav
items.title: Pill Nav
items.description: Animated pill-shaped nav with circular GSAP hover and mobile menu.

items.name: pixel-card
items.title: Pixel Card
items.description: Card with shimmering pixel canvas effect on hover/focus.

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile Card
items.description: Holographic profile card with pointer/device-orientation tilt and animated shine.

items.name: reflective-card
items.title: Reflective Card
items.description: Webcam-fed metallic glass card using SVG turbulence and specular lighting filters.

items.name: scroll-stack
items.title: Scroll Stack
items.description: Scroll-driven card stack with pin/scale/blur/rotation, powered by Lenis smooth-scroll.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: Card with a soft radial spotlight that follows the cursor.

items.name: stack
items.title: Stack
items.description: Draggable card stack with spring rotation and send-to-back interaction.

items.name: staggered-menu
items.title: Staggered Menu
items.description: Full-screen staggered slide-in menu with layered colors and GSAP timelines.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: Animated multi-step form with sliding step content and round step indicators.

items.name: tilted-card
items.title: Tilted Card
items.description: 3D tilt-on-mouse card with spring physics and a cursor-following caption.

items.name: blur-text
items.title: Blur Text
items.description: Per-word/letter blur-in animation triggered when scrolled into view, with configurable direction, easing and stepped keyframes.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count Up
items.description: Spring-animated number counter that counts up (or down) when scrolled into view, with configurable spring physics, delay, and number formatting.

items.name: falling-text
items.title: Falling Text
items.description: Characters fall with gravity + bounce creating a playful entrance.

items.name: glitch-text
items.title: Glitch Text
items.description: RGB-split glitch effect on text using clip-path keyframe animation, with optional hover-only mode.

items.name: gradient-text
items.title: Gradient Text
items.description: Animated multi-color gradient text with optional border, direction, yoyo and pause-on-hover.

items.name: shiny-text
items.title: Shiny Text
items.description: Animated shiny gradient sweep across text, with yoyo + direction controls.

items.name: split-text
items.title: Split Text
items.description: Splits text into characters / words for staggered entrance animation.

items.name: true-focus
items.title: True Focus
items.description: Applies dynamic blur / clarity based over a series of words in order.
